article.body_preview:
DHAKA, March 18, 2023 (BSS) - Speakers at a conference today said that achievement of a trillion-dollar-plus economy requires all stakeholders to work together to address the issues and also to take bold steps and make necessary policy reforms.

They also came up with a number of recommendations for policy reformations in the areas like ensuring quality education and setting up of technical schools, ensuring digital education, development of IT infrastructures, setting-up of bonded warehouse, ne

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Presently, the manufacturing and other essential goods importers are facing difficulty to some extent due to limited access to L/C opening.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly links limited access to Letters of Credit to difficulties faced by manufacturing and essential goods importers, directly relating to LC-driven aggregate import volumes as defined.
